fields.label: User
fields.description: The target user this question is for. Owner-visibility (if_owner) is enforced by stamping doc.owner from this field at insert, regardless of which identity performs the insert (e.g. the pattern-learning engine running as Administrator) - see the controller docstring.

fields.label: Question
fields.description: Generic-tone text shown to the user (never names a reviewer, even for reviewer-originated follow-ups).

fields.label: Context (Markdown)
fields.description: What Jarvis found - shown in the answer panel alongside the question.

fields.label: Origin
fields.options:
Behavioural Learning
From your organisation
From your chat patterns
From your reviewer

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Deleted is a soft-delete: rows are marked, never hard-removed, and every list/probe endpoint must exclude them explicitly (see the controller docstring).

fields.label: Source Pattern
fields.description: Provenance: the learned-pattern row this question was materialized from (Behavioural Learning / From your chat patterns origins). Mirrors Jarvis Learned Pattern.materialized_skill's back-link idiom.

fields.label: Source Config
fields.description: Provenance: the admin-configured rule this question was materialized from (From your organisation origin).

fields.label: Asked By
fields.description: Reviewer who triggered a follow-up question (From your reviewer origin). Stored for audit only - never surfaced in the UI (the origin badge stays generic; see the reviewer-anonymity decision in DESIGN.md section 6).

fields.label: Answer Note
fields.description: The Note this question's answer created. A re-answer replaces this link; the previous note is kept, just no longer referenced from here.
